valid.name: add-identity
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN id bigint GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY NOT NULL;

valid.name: add-not-null-with-default
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active';

valid.name: add-nullable
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN status text;

invalid.name: add-not-null
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN status text NOT NULL;

errors.message: `ADD COLUMN ... NOT NULL` without a `DEFAULT` aborts the migration on any table that already has rows. Either supply a `DEFAULT`, or add the column nullable first, backfill, and then `ALTER COLUMN ... SET NOT NULL` in a follow-up.
